name: Synthetic Construction Partner 31 – Boutique Hotel Owner No Construction Activity
activities: Sofia Papadaki owns and operates a small boutique hotel and an adjoining restaurant in Santorini, catering exclusively to leisure tourists. She has no involvement, ownership stake, employment or business dealings of any kind in the construction industry, government contracting, or infrastructure development, and none of her past or current activities relate to government construction or infrastructure projects.
origin_of_assets: Hotel and restaurant business income; family inheritance of the original property.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Hotel and restaurant property and operating assets.
